name: Sen. Barry Goldwater's Expert Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried pinto beans in water, covered, overnight.
2. In a large Dutch oven, cook the beef until browned, stirring to keep it crumbly. Drain off any drippings if needed.
3. Add the tomato paste, chopped onions, and drained beans to the pot.
4. Mix together the chili powder, cumin, and season with salt to taste.
5. Stir this mixture into the pot containing the beef and tomatoes.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat, cover, and simmer until the beans are tender, about 5 hours.
7. Serves 6
